evidence.text: 9 Different Ways to Optimize AI Agent Memories <!-- omit in toc --> # Optimizing Memory of AI Agents One way to optimize an AI agent is to design its [architecture with multiple sub-agents to improve accuracy](https://medium.com/r/?url=https%3A%2F%2Flevelup.gitconnected.com%2Fbuilding-a-multi-agent-ai-system-with-langgraph-and-langsmith-6cb70487cd81). However, in conversational AI, optimization doesn’t stop there—memory becomes even more crucial.
